metadata.name: Wyoming Business Search
metadata.description: Search Wyoming Secretary of State business filings

actions.description: Solve CAPTCHA if present (retry up to 3 times)

condition.text: What code is in the image?

actions.javascript: async () => { const images = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img')); let best = null; let bestArea = 0; for (const img of images) { const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect(); const area = rect.width * rect.height; if (area > 6000 && area > bestArea && img.offsetParent !== null) { best = img; bestArea = area; } } if (!best) return null; const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = best.naturalWidth || best.width; canvas.height = best.naturalHeight || best.height; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.drawImage(best, 0, 0); const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); return dataUrl; }

() => { const body = document.body?.innerText || ''; return body.includes('RESULTS:') || body.includes('Results:') || !!document.querySelector('#MainContent_grdSearchResults tr td, table[id*="SearchResults"] tr td'); }

actions.description: Extract search results and total count
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const detailLinkSelector = "a[href*='FilingDetails.aspx'], a[href*='eFNum=']"; const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(detailLinkSelector)); const results = []; const seen = new Set(); for (const link of links) { const detailsHref = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; const detailsUrl = detailsHref ? new URL(detailsHref, window.location.href).toString() : ''; if (!detailsUrl || seen.has(detailsUrl)) continue; const row = link.closest('tr'); const rowText = normalize(row?.textContent); let combinedText = rowText; if (row) { const nextRow = row.nextElementSibling; const nextRowHasDetailsLink = !!nextRow?.querySelector(detailLinkSelector); const nextRowText = normalize(nextRow?.textContent); if (nextRowText && !nextRowHasDetailsLink) { combinedText = normalize(`${rowText} ${nextRowText}`); } } if (!combinedText) { combinedText = normalize(link.closest('table, div, li')?.textContent) || normalize(link.textContent); } if (!combinedText) continue; results.push({ text: combinedText, detailsUrl }); seen.add(detailsUrl); } return JSON.stringify(results); }

() => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const detailLinkSelector = "a[href*='FilingDetails.aspx'], a[href*='eFNum=']"; const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(detailLinkSelector)); const results = []; const seen = new Set(); for (const link of links) { const detailsHref = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; const detailsUrl = detailsHref ? new URL(detailsHref, window.location.href).toString() : ''; if (!detailsUrl || seen.has(detailsUrl)) continue; const row = link.closest('tr'); const rowText = normalize(row?.textContent); let combinedText = rowText; if (row) { const nextRow = row.nextElementSibling; const nextRowHasDetailsLink = !!nextRow?.querySelector(detailLinkSelector); const nextRowText = normalize(nextRow?.textContent); if (nextRowText && !nextRowHasDetailsLink) { combinedText = normalize(`${rowText} ${nextRowText}`); } } if (!combinedText) { combinedText = normalize(link.closest('table, div, li')?.textContent) || normalize(link.textContent); } if (!combinedText) continue; results.push({ text: combinedText, detailsUrl }); seen.add(detailsUrl); } return JSON.stringify(results); }
